regions.name: The Greenwood
regions.description: A vast and ancient forest covering the eastern reaches, its canopy so thick that sunlight barely touches the forest floor.

regions.name: Eldergrove
regions.description: An old-growth forest in the northwest where enormous trees tower above all else, said to be as old as the world itself.

regions.name: Pineheart Woods
regions.description: A dense pine forest in the southern reaches, its resinous scent carrying for miles on the wind.

regions.name: The Thornweald
regions.description: A tangled central woodland choked with thorny undergrowth. Few paths exist, and those that do shift with the seasons.

regions.name: Windbreak Copse
regions.description: A wind-battered stretch of coastal woodland that shields the northeastern shores from ocean storms.

regions.name: Briartangle
regions.description: A wild thicket in the west where briar roses grow taller than a man and the paths change overnight.

regions.name: The Ashspine Range
regions.description: The great mountain spine that divides the northern reaches from the heartlands. Its peaks are wreathed in perpetual cloud.

regions.name: Stormcrest Highlands
regions.description: A cluster of storm-battered peaks in the south-central region where lightning strikes with unnatural frequency.

regions.name: The Fangpeaks
regions.description: Three jagged peaks in the west that resemble enormous fangs jutting from the earth.

regions.name: Ironridge
regions.description: A low northeastern ridge rich in iron ore, its exposed rock faces stained rust-red.

regions.name: Mount Cinderveil
regions.description: A dormant volcano in the southeast, its caldera perpetually shrouded in warm, sulfurous haze.

regions.name: The Rotmire
regions.description: A vast and treacherous swamp in the southeast where the ground itself seems to breathe. Many who enter are never seen again.

regions.name: Bogwater Fen
regions.description: Eastern marshlands fed by underground springs, the water here has an eerie green luminescence at night.

regions.name: Misthollow Bog
regions.description: A small central bog perpetually blanketed in thick mist. Strange lights drift between the dead trees.

regions.name: Weeping Marsh
regions.description: Western wetlands near the coast where willows hang low over murky pools that never seem to dry.

regions.name: The Scorchflats
regions.description: A vast southwestern desert of cracked earth and endless dunes. The sun here is merciless and water is worth more than gold.

regions.name: Dusthowl Badlands
regions.description: A maze of eroded sandstone pillars and dry ravines where the wind howls through narrow canyons.

regions.name: The Dry Steppe
regions.description: A parched stretch of grassland in the northern foothills where rain is rare and the soil is sandy and thin.
